'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 20''' is the twentieth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 20 was published in Fall [[1993]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"George Lucas' Super Live Adventure: An Action-Packed Spectacle Tours Japan"
*"How A Classic Newspaper Strip Became A Comic Book Series: The Story Behind Classic Star Wars"
*"Inside New Collectables From Star Wars and Indiana Jones"
*"The Special Effects of Jurassic Park"
*"The Latest From LucasArts Entertainment Co."
